Guideline: Use transition utilities for smooth state changes
Description: Apply transition classes for hover and focus states to improve perceived performance
Do: Use transition-all, transition-colors, or specific property transitions
Don't: Use CSS animations for simple hover effects

Description: Transforms are GPU-accelerated and perform better than top/left changes
Do: Use translate-x and translate-y for movement animations
Don't: Animate top/left/right/bottom properties

Guideline: Use animation utilities for keyframe animations
Description: Tailwind provides built-in animation utilities for common patterns
Do: Use animate-spin for loading indicators
Don't: Create custom CSS for basic animations

Guideline: Control animation timing with duration utilities
Description: Use consistent duration values across your application
Do: Stick to the duration scale (75-1000ms)
Don't: Use arbitrary duration values inconsistently

Description: Tailwind provides z-0 through z-50 plus z-auto
Do: Use predefined z-index values from the scale
Don't: Use arbitrary z-index values like z-[9999]

Description: Define clear stacking contexts for modals dropdowns and tooltips
Do: Create a z-index system: base(0) dropdown(10) modal(40) tooltip(50)
Don't: Mix z-index values without a system

Guideline: Use isolation to create stacking contexts
Description: The isolate class creates a new stacking context
Do: Use isolate on parent containers to scope z-index
Don't: Let z-index values leak across components

Description: Flex is ideal for rows or columns of items
Do: Use flex for navigation bars and card layouts
Don't: Use flex for complex two-dimensional grids

Guideline: Use CSS Grid for two-dimensional layouts
Description: Grid excels at rows AND columns simultaneously
Do: Use grid for page layouts and card grids
Don't: Use nested flexbox for grid-like layouts

Description: The container class centers content and applies responsive max-widths
Do: Use container with mx-auto for centered layouts
Don't: Set fixed widths manually

Guideline: Prefer gap over margin for flex/grid spacing
Description: Gap is cleaner and doesn't require negative margins or last-child selectors
Do: Use gap-4 for consistent spacing between items
Don't: Use margin on children with last:mr-0

Guideline: Use object-fit utilities for image sizing
Description: Control how images fill their containers without distortion
Do: Use object-cover for hero images and avatars
Don't: Let images stretch or distort

Description: Maintain consistent image proportions across screen sizes
Do: Use aspect-video or aspect-square utilities
Don't: Use padding-bottom hack for aspect ratios

Guideline: Use rounded utilities consistently for images
Description: Apply consistent border-radius to images across the application
Do: Use rounded-lg or rounded-full for avatars
Don't: Mix different border-radius values on similar elements

Guideline: Add loading lazy attribute for below-fold images
Description: Defer loading of images not immediately visible
Do: Add loading=lazy to images below the fold
Don't: Load all images eagerly

Description: Tailwind provides text-xs through text-9xl
Do: Use text-sm text-base text-lg from the scale
Don't: Use arbitrary font sizes like text-[17px]

Description: Use font-medium font-semibold font-bold for hierarchy
Do: Use font-semibold for headings and font-normal for body
Don't: Use multiple weights inconsistently

Description: Control line spacing for readability
Do: Use leading-relaxed for body text
Don't: Use tight line-height for long paragraphs

Description: Adjust letter-spacing for headings and uppercase text
Do: Use tracking-wide for uppercase labels
Don't: Apply tracking to body text

Guideline: Use prose for rich text content
Description: The typography plugin styles markdown/CMS content beautifully
Do: Use prose class for blog posts and articles
Don't: Style rich text manually

Guideline: Use semantic color naming in config
Description: Name colors by purpose not visual appearance
Do: Use colors like primary secondary danger success
Don't: Use colors like blue-500 red-400 directly

Guideline: Apply opacity modifiers for color variations
Description: Use the color/opacity syntax for transparent colors
Do: Use bg-black/50 for overlays
Don't: Create separate color variables for each opacity

Guideline: Use ring utilities for focus states
Description: Ring creates accessible focus indicators
Do: Use ring-2 ring-blue-500 for focus states
Don't: Use outline or box-shadow for focus

Description: Meet WCAG AA contrast requirements (4.5:1 for text)
Do: Test color combinations for accessibility
Don't: Use light gray text on white backgrounds

Description: Tailwind uses a 4px base (1=4px 2=8px 4=16px)
Do: Use p-4 m-2 gap-6 from the scale
Don't: Use arbitrary values like p-[13px]

Description: Use the same spacing for similar contexts
Do: Use p-4 for all card padding consistently
Don't: Mix p-3 p-4 p-5 on similar components

Guideline: Use space utilities for stacked elements
Description: Space-y and space-x add margin between children
Do: Use space-y-4 for vertical stacks
Don't: Add margin-top to each child manually

Guideline: Prefer padding over margin for components
Description: Padding keeps spacing internal to components
Do: Use padding for button and card internal spacing
Don't: Use margin for component internal spacing

Guideline: Use form-input plugin for consistent styling
Description: The forms plugin provides better base form styles
Do: Install @tailwindcss/forms for form resets
Don't: Style each input from scratch

Description: Show focus rings only for keyboard navigation
Do: Use focus-visible:ring-2 for inputs
Don't: Use focus:ring-2 which shows on click too

Description: Use fieldset and legend for related inputs
Do: Wrap related inputs in fieldset with legend
Don't: Use div without semantic grouping

Description: Style elements based on sibling input state
Do: Use peer and peer-invalid for error styling
Don't: Use JavaScript to toggle error classes

Description: Tailwind uses min-width breakpoints by default
Do: Start with mobile styles and add sm: md: lg:
Don't: Start with desktop and use max-width queries

Description: Apply breakpoints in ascending order
Do: Use sm: md: lg: xl: in order
Don't: Skip breakpoints or use them inconsistently

Description: Verify layouts at each Tailwind breakpoint
Don't: Only test on one screen size

Description: Show/hide elements at different breakpoints
Do: Use hidden md:block for desktop-only elements
Don't: Use JavaScript to toggle visibility

Description: Define a button size system with specific padding
Do: Create size variants: sm(px-3 py-1.5) md(px-4 py-2) lg(px-6 py-3)
Don't: Use different padding on each button

Description: Provide visual feedback for interactions
Do: Use hover:bg-blue-700 active:bg-blue-800
Don't: Only use hover without active state

Description: Style disabled buttons clearly
Do: Use disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
Don't: Leave disabled buttons with default styling

Description: Align icons and text properly in buttons
Do: Use inline-flex items-center gap-2
Don't: Use flex which makes button block-level

Description: Apply same padding shadow and radius to all cards
Do: Define card base: rounded-lg shadow-md p-6
Don't: Use different styles for similar cards

Description: Clip images to card boundaries
Do: Use overflow-hidden on card with rounded corners
Don't: Let images overflow rounded corners

Guideline: Use divide utilities for card sections
Description: Separate card sections with consistent borders
Do: Use divide-y for vertical section separation
Don't: Add border-t manually to each section

Guideline: Apply group for card hover effects
Description: Use group-hover for coordinated hover animations
Do: Use group on card and group-hover on children
Don't: Add hover effects to each element separately

Guideline: Use sr-only for screen reader text
Description: Provide context for icon-only buttons
Do: Add sr-only span with descriptive text
Don't: Leave icon buttons without labels

Description: Show focus indicators for keyboard navigation
Do: Use focus-visible:ring-2 on interactive elements
Don't: Remove focus outlines completely

Guideline: Use not-sr-only to reveal hidden text
Description: Show screen reader text on focus for skip links
Do: Use focus:not-sr-only for skip links
Don't: Keep skip links always hidden

Description: Make buttons and links easy to tap on mobile
Do: Use min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] for touch targets
Don't: Use small tap targets on mobile

Description: Tailwind generates only used classes in production
Do: Configure content paths in tailwind.config.js
Don't: Include all Tailwind classes in production

Description: Arbitrary values cannot be purged as efficiently
Do: Use scale values over arbitrary ones
Don't: Overuse arbitrary values like w-[237px]

Description: JIT compiles on-demand for faster builds
Do: JIT is default in Tailwind v3+
Don't: Use classic AOT mode in development
Code Good: /* Tailwind v3+ uses JIT by default */

Guideline: Use official plugins for common needs
Description: Tailwind provides plugins for forms typography and aspect-ratio
Do: Install @tailwindcss/typography for prose styles
Don't: Recreate plugin functionality manually

Description: Extract common patterns into reusable plugins
Do: Create plugin for button variants used across app
Don't: Copy-paste the same utilities everywhere

Description: Use extend in config to add to default theme
Do: Use theme.extend.colors to add colors
Don't: Override theme.colors losing all defaults

Guideline: Use CSS variables for dynamic theming
Description: Enable dark mode and runtime theme switching
Do: Define colors as CSS variables in config
Don't: Hardcode color values without variables
